itinerary.title: Tokyo
itinerary.description: Explore Shibuya, Akihabara, and Senso-ji temple. Experience the world's best sushi at Tsukiji.

itinerary.title: Kyoto
itinerary.description: Visit Fushimi Inari, Kinkaku-ji, and the bamboo groves. Participate in a traditional tea ceremony.

itinerary.title: Osaka
itinerary.description: Dive into Dotonbori's street food. Visit Osaka Castle and the vibrant Shinsekai district.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Final morning in Osaka before your homeward journey.

title: Japan: Land of the Rising Sun
description: A carefully crafted journey through Japan's most iconic cities. From Tokyo's electric energy to Kyoto's serene temples and Osaka's legendary street food scene.
